name: Red Lobster's Cheese Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, mix together Bisquick, cold water, and grated cheddar until well combined.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a greased baking sheet.
4. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Remove from the oven and brush melted butter mixed with garlic powder, parsley flakes, and Italian seasoning over the warm biscuits. Adjust amounts as needed for your batch size.
6. Serve hot.
